<!--
Before filing a localization suggestion:
- Confirm the issue still reproduces on the current repository version.
- Search existing issues and make sure it has not already been reported.
-->

**Describe the issue**
<!-- What text is incorrect, unclear, inconsistent, or awkward? -->

**Affected locale**
<!-- Example: en-GB, fr-FR, de-DE -->

**Where it appears**
<!-- Mode, panel, screen, or control name. -->

**Current text**
<!-- Quote the current string if possible. -->

**Suggested text**
<!-- Provide the proposed wording if you have one. -->

**Screenshots**
<!-- Add screenshots when useful. -->

**Environment**
- Browser:
- Browser version:
- OS:
- Locale:

**Additional context**
<!-- Add anything else that would help validate the suggestion. -->
